headline: What If My Ladder Was Broken Before I Even Started Climbing?
articleBody: If the ladder was old, missing feet, or had a broken rung, your case might involve more than just a standard claim. Employers are required to provide safe equipment, and a equipment failure can change everything. Don't let them blame your "clumsiness" for their bad gear. We specialize in proving these details to get you the settlement you actually deserve. Give us a call to chat about it.
